task: held-out Sanskrit audio → romanized text (CER, lower=better)
primary_metric: cer_norm (transliteration-folded ASCII phonetic skeleton — scheme-neutral, fair)
secondary_metric: cer_raw (against SLP1 gold as-is; favors the SLP1-native specialist)
decode: all models: greedy, fixed 64-token budget, no gold-length oracle
comparison: specialist vs open generalist ALMs, identical audio + identical scoring

leaderboard.alm_type: generalist (8 langs incl Hindi, no Sanskrit)

note: Genuine multi-ALM comparison. Earlier runs fed Qwen no audio (audios= kwarg silently ignored in transformers 4.57) → a single canned hallucination (CER 15.9); that was a harness bug. Fixed to audio= (audio verified to reach the model: per-clip outputs vary and differ from a zero-audio control). Per-clip predictions for every model in alm_vs_alm_records.json.
rescored: host rescore: SLP1/Devanagari→IAST + ASCII phonetic fold (indic-transliteration)
